name: Fatui
desc: A Snezhnayan organization that is loyal to the Tsaritsa and has spread out all over the continent. Its Harbingers are on the hunt for the Gnoses.

content.text: Relationships
The Fatui serve the Cryo Archon of Snezhnaya.
Fatui Harbingers
Leader and the first Fatui Harbinger, known as The Jester. He is a former
mage who couldn't save his kingdom.
The First of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as The Captain. He is a former Khaenri'ahn captain who couldn't protect his kingdom. The Captain and his subordinates fought for Natlan during the
500 years ago and during the Abyss invasion. He sacrificed himself to restore the Ley Lines in Natlan and to turn the curse of immortality against
. After the duel with
, The Captain asked the Tsaritsa to remove him from the responsibility of obtaining the Gnosis, and his request was granted. After his sacrifice, the Tsaritsa decided to keep his position.
The Second of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as The Doctor. He is a former scholar of the
who was expelled about 400 years ago. The Doctor had multiple segments of himself that were erased as a deal with the Dendro Archon.
The Third of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as Damselette.

The Fourth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as The Knave. She is a descendant of the Crimson Moon Dynasty of Khaenri'ah and a "Father" of the House of the Hearth. Arlecchino became the Harbinger after killing the previous Knave.
The Fifth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as The Rooster. He is a mayor of Snezhnaya.
The Sixth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as The Balladeer. He is a puppet created by Raiden Ei. After Scaramouche erased himself from
and became
, it is now considered that the place of the sixth Harbinger has been vacant for several hundreds of years. The Doctor tried to create an Archon from The Balladeer using the Electro
The Seventh of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as Marionette. She is interested in research and machines.
The Eighth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, also known as The Fair Lady. She was a Mondstadter named Rosalyne-Kruzchka Lohefalter. During the
, she was in Sumeru, and when she returned to Mondstadt, she found her beloved dead. Out of grief, she drank a liquid flame and became the Crimson Witch of Flames. La Signora was executed by
in a duel before the throne. After her death, the eighth rank is vacant.
The Ninth of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as Regrator. He is in charge of Snezhnaya's economic policies.
The Eleventh of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers, known as Childe. He is a skillful fighter who considers the Traveler a friend.
The former Knave and "Mother" of the House of the Hearth. She was killed by Arlecchino.
Notable Fatui
Children of the House of the Hearth who serve Arlecchino.
Clervie
Crucabena's daughter and Arlecchino's childhood friend.
Madeleine
The Fatui agents deserted from the organization with their son,
The Fatui soldiers who were tasked to capture
The Fatui in Mondstadt.
A pupil of the House of the Hearth under Crucabena's management and a spy in the Grand Narukami Shrine. After being exposed, she left the Fatui and became a maiden in the shrine under the name
Guards of the Northland Bank in Liyue.
The receptionist at the Northland Bank in Liyue.
The commander of the ninth company which was sent to the Liyue Chasm to investigate the Wish Granter.
Katarina
A member of the ninth company, Lyudochka's friend, and Kolya's older sister with whom she grew up in the House of the Hearth.
A.M. Shumilov
The second Lieutenant of the 34th Independent Investigative Squad.
Malinovskyi
The Captain of the 34th Independent Investigative Squad.
Fatui Soldiers
Elite agents who are selected while still children. They use the Cryo or Anemo Delusions.
Secret agents of the Fatui. They use the Pyro Delusion.
Elite members of the Fatui. They use the Hydro Delusion.
Fatui mages who use the Mist Grass to control Electro and Cryo Cicins.
Fatui soldiers who use special costumes or weapons to control the elemental power.
Related Items
Trailers and Story Teasers
A Winter Night's Lazzo
No one knows how long it has been since all the Fatui Harbingers last gathered.
On this winter night, people donning masks who had just been singing and squabbling, fell silent in mournful meditation.
Only then did the hall join the winter sky in infinite silence.
Meanwhile, in distant Sumeru, Collei who has not had dreams for a long time, saw strange visions during her midday nap...
YouTube:
"The Song Burning in the Embers"
April 17, 2024
Some believe that growing up is to gradually break free from the shackles.
Fate sets the most brutal rules for us, turning day into night, leaving the future dwelling in but the lingering warmth of dreams.
Thus, our weapons clash, burying the remnants of another setting sun, and welcoming the next rising dawn.
Then, when the cage shatters, once and for all—
May gentle flames envelop the shriveled flowers, with their song echoing in the embers.
YouTube:
Cutscene Animation: "Goodbye"
April 30, 2024
On this night, several members left the House of the Hearth.
Some have a new future ahead of them, all except for one, who has reached the end of her journey.
When dawn breaks and illuminates what remains, it is time to say goodbye.
